content.query:
SELECT 
JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.cono') AS [company]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.clno') AS [clno]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.ecln') AS [ecln]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.variationnumber') AS [variationnumber]

FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/JSON/ACLHED*.json',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        FIELDQUOTE = '0x0b',
        FIELDTERMINATOR ='0x0b',
        ROWTERMINATOR = '0x0a',
        DATA_COMPRESSION = 'GZIP'
    )
    WITH (
        jsonContent varchar(MAX)
    ) AS [result]
WHERE JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.variationnumber') in (

--SELECT JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.cono') as [Company], JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.clno') as [Claim], MAX (JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.variationnumber')) AS [variationnumber]
SELECT MAX (JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.variationnumber')) AS [variationnumber]

FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/JSON/ACLHED*.json',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        FIELDQUOTE = '0x0b',
        FIELDTERMINATOR ='0x0b',
        ROWTERMINATOR = '0x0a',
        DATA_COMPRESSION = 'GZIP'
    )
    WITH (
        jsonContent varchar(MAX)
    ) AS [result]
WHERE JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.cono')=752 
GROUP BY JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.cono'), JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.clno'))
